column5: World's most valuable ruby variety; Mogok origin commands highest premiums

Unheated Burmese rubies command 2-5x premium over heated stones (GIA, SSEF research)
58% premium over current world record ($34.8M). Justified by: exceptional size + pigeon's blood color + no heat + Burmese origin + extraordinary provenance
3-Appraisal Rule: Average of 2 lowest appraisals. Assumed 12.7% discount from claimed value as conservative baseline

$48M offering ÷ $100K per token. Fractional ownership enabling broader accredited investor access
Average $400K investment per investor. Range: $100K-$2M per investor typical for alternative assets
Standard Reg D 506(c) offering window. Can extend if not fully subscribed
Permits general solicitation; ALL investors must be verified accredited. Simplified self-cert for $200K+ (2025 guidance)
Low gas costs ($0.01-0.10/tx), Brickken supported, Chainlink PoR available, full EVM compatibility
$32B+ tokenized; DTCC joined ecosystem (March 2025); built-in KYC/compliance at smart contract level
Wyoming or Delaware. Each series bankruptcy-remote. One stone per series.
Wyoming: $100 formation + $60/yr. Delaware: $110 formation + $300/yr. Wyoming offers better privacy.

column2: Independent CGA/MGA certified appraiser. Physical inspection + written report.

column2: Second independent appraiser. Zero affiliation with Appraiser #1 or any party.

column7: Net Income

column1: 1. All estimates use best-available sourced data as of March 2026. Actual costs will vary based on negotiations, market conditions, and deal specifics.
2. Broker-dealer placement is the single largest cost (5-12% of offering). Digital-first distribution under 506(c) general solicitation can significantly reduce this.
3. PleoChrome's direct costs are largely fixed regardless of asset value — creating significant operating leverage above $25M per stone.
4. Annual ongoing costs (0.76% of asset value at $55M) are competitive with traditional alternative asset administration (typically 1-2%).
5. The 3-Appraisal Rule discount (12.7% from claimed value) is a conservative assumption. Actual discount depends on appraisal variance.
6. $55M ruby valuation would be a world record. The model works at any asset value — sensitivity analysis shows profitability above ~$17M per stone.
7. Multi-asset portfolio projection assumes PleoChrome builds pipeline over 5 years. Fixed costs are shared across portfolio, improving margins.
8. Revenue model excludes potential future income from: token-backed lending, secondary market ATS integration, and multi-jurisdiction expansion.
